svg.text: Restricted Web3 Assistant — Agentic Commerce Workflow
Use case: AI-assisted DeFi yield deposit (500 USDC)
✋ MANUAL CONFIRMATION GATE 1 — ERC-20 Approval Signature ✋
AI cannot sign on user's behalf
✋ MANUAL CONFIRMATION GATE 2 — Deposit Contract Write Signature ✋
If agent holds key, compromise = full
fund loss → scoped session keys only
